title: Epigram - Thy Nags, The Leanest Things Alive
content:
Thy nags, the leanest things alive,
So very hard thou lovest to drive,
I heard thy anxious coachman say
It costs thee more in whips than hay.
meaning:
Matthew Prior's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epigram - Thy Nags, The Leanest Things Alive"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
